uw-seattle-materials-science-engineering.title: Materials Science & Engineering
uw-seattle-materials-science-engineering.recommendedTrackSummary: AST-2/MRP is the current closest Green River transfer path for this degree because it matches 13 of the 19 degree-specific Green River classes currently tracked for this major.
whyThisTrack: AST-2/MRP has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including ENGL& 101, MATH& 151, CHEM& 161, MATH& 152, plus 9 more.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that AST-2/MRP does not cover by itself.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: NME Option Core/Elective Requirement: 19 credits
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: NME Option students complete 19 credits of NME Core and Elective Requirements instead of the standard 15-credit MSE Technical Elective requirement. This replaces the standard 15-credit MSE technical elective requirement. Normal MSE technical elective rules are not the active requirement for this option unless the NME source explicitly permits overlap. NME core: NME 220 is required and must be taken in spring of sophomore or junior year. NME electives: choose 15 credits from approved NME elective courses. Quarter offerings listed in the UW source are subject to change.

requirementGroup.label: NME Option Core/Elective Requirement: 19 credits
notes: NME Option students complete 19 credits of NME Core and Elective Requirements instead of the standard 15-credit MSE Technical Elective requirement.

NME electives: choose 15 credits from approved NME elective courses.
